ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "period" TEXT /* Time period of the record (e.g., YYYY-Month) */,
  "cs_index" REAL /* Consumer Sentiment Index value */,
  "usa" REAL /* USA index value */,
  "housing_affordability_index" REAL /* Housing Affordability Index value */,
  "market_absorption_rate" REAL /* Market Absorption Rate percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment Rate percentage */,
  "financial_obligations_ratio" REAL /* Financial obligations ratio */,
  "consumer_debt_service_ratio" REAL /* Consumer debt service ratio */,
  "debt_service_ratio" REAL /* Debt service ratio */,
  "mortgage_debt_service_ratio" REAL /* Mortgage debt service ratio */,
  "cs_1_month" REAL /* Consumer Sentiment Index for 1 month */,
  "cs_3_month" REAL /* Consumer Sentiment Index for 3 months */,
  "cs_6_month" REAL /* Consumer Sentiment Index for 6 months */,
  "cs_12_month" REAL /* Consumer Sentiment Index for 12 months */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price in the region */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent in the region */,
  "new_home_sales" INTEGER /* Number of new home sales in the period */,
  "existing_home_sales" INTEGER /* Number of existing home sales in the period */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median days a property stays on the market */,
  "foreclosure_rate" REAL /* Percentage of foreclosures in the period */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate in the region */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, Southwest) */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the city */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "period_range" TEXT /* Time period covered by the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used in the report */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Whether the report is private or shared */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., National Bureau of Economic Research) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source (0-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the uploaded data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File name of the uploaded data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the uploaded data file in MB */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the uploaded data (0-10) */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view report, download data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
